input: {"command": "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const csv=fs.readFileSync(\"[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]",\"utf8\").trim().split(/\\r?\\n/); if(csv[0]!==\"zone_id,area_ac,NDVI,soil_N_ppm,yield_goal_bu_ac,base_N_lbsN_ac,adjusted_N_lbsN_ac,total_N_lbs,notes\") throw new Error(\"CSV header mismatch\"); const rows=csv.slice(1).map(r=>r.split(/,(?=(?:[^\"]*\"[^\"]*\")*[^\"]*$)/)); if(rows.length!==3) throw new Error(\"Expected 3 data rows\"); const totals=rows.map(r=>Number(r[7])); const sum=totals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); const expected=3440.025; if(Math.abs(sum-expected)>1e-9) throw new Error(`Total mismatch ${sum} vs ${expected}`); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"actual_outputs.json\",\"utf8\")); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"agent_trace.json\",\"utf8\")); console.log(JSON.stringify({rows:rows.length,total:sum},null,2));'"}
label: positive

input.command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const csv=fs.readFileSync("[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]","utf8").trim().split(/\r?\n/); if(csv[0]!=="zone_id,area_ac,NDVI,soil_N_ppm,yield_goal_bu_ac,base_N_lbsN_ac,adjusted_N_lbsN_ac,total_N_lbs,notes") throw new Error("CSV header mismatch"); const rows=csv.slice(1).map(r=>r.split(/,(?=(?:[^"]*"[^"]*")*[^"]*$)/)); if(rows.length!==3) throw new Error("Expected 3 data rows"); const totals=rows.map(r=>Number(r[7])); const sum=totals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); const expected=3440.025; if(Math.abs(sum-expected)>1e-9) throw new Error(`Total mismatch ${sum} vs ${expected}`); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("actual_outputs.json","utf8")); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("agent_trace.json","utf8")); console.log(JSON.stringify({rows:rows.length,total:sum},null,2));'
